text_fr: Invites the  Member States  to  implement  the General  Assembly  resolution  of  19  November 1946;
text_en: Invites the Member States to implement the General Assembly resolution of 19 November 1946;

text_fr: Reaffirms its  position  that the main task con› cerning displaced persons is  to encourage and as› si~t in every possible way their early return to their countries of origin, in accordance with the Gen› eral  Assembly  resolution  of  12  F cbruary  1946, and that no obstacles be placed in the way of the early fulfilment of this task;
text_en: Reaffirmations its position that the main task con› cerning displaced persons is to encourage and as› if~t in every possible way their early return to their countries of origin, in accordance with the Gen› eral Assembly resolution of 12 F cbruary 1946, and that no obstacles be placed in the way of the early settlement of this task;

text_fr: Invites the  Member States  not to  accord  aid and  protection  to  individuals  or  organizations which are engaged in the promoting or operating of illegal immigration, or in activities designed to promote illegal immigration;
text_en: Invites the Member States not to agree aid and protection to individuals or organizations which are engaged in the promotion or operation of illegal immigration, or in activities designed to promote illegal immigration;

text_fr: Recommends each  Member  of  the  United Nations to  adopt  urgent  measures for  the  early return of  the  repatriablc refugees  and  displaced persons to their countries of origin, having regard to the General Assembly  resolution  llf  12  Febru› ary 1916, and for settling a fair sblre of the non› r~patriable  refugees  and displaced  persons in its country; to inform the Secretary-General without delay  of  the  results  of  the  consideration  it  has given, in implementation of  resolution 62  (I)  of the General Assembly,  paragraph  ( e), to  receiv› ing, in conformity with the principles of the Inter› national  Refugee  Organization,  its  fair  share  of non-repatriable persons,  and to collaborate with other nations, for instance through the Interna› tional  Refugee  Organization  or  its  Preparatory Commission. in the development of overall plans to  accomplish this end;
text_en: Recommendations each Member of the United Nations to adopt urgent measures for the early return of the stateless refugees and displaced persons to their countries of origin, having regard to the General Assembly resolution llf 12 Febru› ary 1916, and for setting a fair sblere of the non› r~patriable refugees and displaced persons in its country; to inform the Secretary-General without delay of the results of the consideration it has given, in implementation of resolution 62 (I) of the General Assembly, paragraph (e), to receive› in accordance with the principals of the Inter› national Refugee Organization, its fair share of non-repatriable persons, and to collaborate with other nations, for instance through the Interna› mental Refugee Organization or its Preparatory Commission. in the development of this whole plan to achieve

text_fr: Requests the  Secretary-General  to  submit,  in collaboration  with  the  Director-General  of  the International Refugee Organization, or the Exec› utive Secretary of its Preparatory Commission, a report on the progress and prospect  of  repatria› tion, resettlement and immigration of the refugees and  displaced  persons,  for  consideration  by  the Economic  and  Social  Council  at  its  seyenth session.
text_en: Requests the Secretary-General to submit, in collaboration with the Director-General of the International Refugee Organization, or the Exec› utive Secretary of its Preparation Commission, a report on the progress and prospect of repatriation›tion, settlement and immigration of the refugees and displaced persons, for consideration by the Economic and Social Council at its seyenth session.

text_fr: Considerant qu'il est  cssentiel,  pour susciter et assurer  l'intfret general  et  l'appui du  public  en faveur  de  l'ccuvre de l'Organisation des  Nations Unies,  d'en  connaJtrc  et  d'en  comprendre  les buts et  les  activites,
text_en: Recognizing that it is essential, in order to generate and ensure the general intreet and public support for the success of the United Nations, to know and to understand its purposes and activities,

text_fr: Recommande a tous  les  Gouvernements  des Etats Membres de prendre, des que possible, des
text_en: Recommends that all Governments of Member States take, as far as possible, the following measures:

text_fr: encourage  the  teaching  of  the  United  Nations Charter  and  the  purposes  and  principles,  the structure, background and activities of the United Nations  in  the  schools  and  institutes  of  higher learning of  their  countries,  with  particular  em› phasis  on  such  instruction  in  elementary  and secondary schools;
text_en: encourages the teaching of the United Nations Charter and the purposes and principles, the structure, background and activities of the United Nations in the schools and institutes of higher learning of their countries, with particular em› phasis on such instruction in elementary and secondary schools;

text_fr: Invites the  United  Nations  Educational,  Sci› entific and Cultural Organization to assist  Mem› bers  of  the  United  Nations,  at their request,  in the implementation of this programme, with the co-operation as required of the Secretary-General of the United Nations, and to  report thereon  to the Economic and Social Council;
text_en: Invites the United Nations Educational, Sci› institutional and Cultural Organization to assist Mem› bers of the United Nations, at their request, in the implementation of this programme, with the co-operation as required of the Secretary-General of the United Nations, and to report there to the Economic and Social Council;

text_fr: Requests Member  States  to  furnish the Secretary-General  with  information  as  to  the measures  which  have  been  taken  to implement this recommendation, such information to be pr<>› sented in  the form  of  a  report to  the  Economic and Social  Council  by  the  Secretary-General  in consultation  with,  and  with  the  assistance of. UNESCO.
text_en: Requests Member States to provide the Secretary-General with information as to the measures which have been taken to implement this recommendation, such information to be pr<>› felt in the form of a report to the Economic and Social Council by the Secretary-General in consultation with, and with the assistance of. UNESCO.
